source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Missing target and reward token uniqueness check in campaign deployment
why_it_looked_bad: NudgeCampaignFactory.deployCampaign and deployAndFundCampaign require non-zero token addresses but do not prevent targetToken and rewardToken from being the same address. This can create confusing or circular incentive structures where users must hold the same token they receive as rewards.
why_not_valid: missing config validation remains low when only trusted admins can set the parameter and no permissionless drain path is shown
downgrade_reason: missing config validation remains low when only trusted admins can set the parameter and no permissionless drain path is shown
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if identical tokens interact badly with reward accounting assumptions
if campaign creation is permissionless or delegated to untrusted operators
if downstream analytics or off-chain systems assume target and reward tokens are distinct
